calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Sargent of Computerlaw Group LLP telephone number 650-327-9800 for Plaintiff Photon Infotech, Inc.
Daniel McCloskey of Duane Morris LLP telephone number 650-847-4176 for Defendant Avenue Code, LLC.
Philip Yeager of Hansen Law Firm telephone number 408-715-7480 for Defendant Lakshmanan Somasundharam.

The matter was argued. Upon conclsuion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Defendant Avenue Code, LLC's demurrer to the second cause of action for trade secret misappropriation in the complaint filed by plaintiff Photon Infotech, Inc. is overruled. Photon adequately alleges a cause of action for trade secret misappropriation. Photon describes the subject matter of the trade secret with sufficient particularity as search engine optimization plans, processes, code, and technical information used for American Eagle's US website and not generally known to the public or others who can obtain value from its disclosure. Photon sufficiently pleads misappropriation by alleging Avenue Code knew from its competitive work that Mr. Somasundharam had proprietary information belonging to Photon with respect to the platform project at American Eagle but nevertheless assigned him to the same project knowing this would help Avenue Code gain a competitive advantage. Photon also alleges Avenue Code knowingly and intentionally acquired, used, and/or disclosed Photon's trade secrets regarding SEO for American Eagle. Order signed in open Court. Defendant has thirty days to file an answer.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Sargent of Computerlaw Group LLP telephone number 650-327-9800 for Plaintiff Photon Infotech, Inc.
Daniel McCloskey of Duane Morris LLP telephone number 650-847-4176 for Defendant Avenue Code, LLC.
Philip Yeager of Hansen Law Firm telephone number 408-715-7480 for Defendant Lakshmanan Somasundharam.

The matter was argued. Upon conclsuion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Defendant Lakshmanan Somasundharam's demurrer to both causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Photon Infotech, Inc. is overruled as to both causes of action. Photon adequately alleges causes of action for breach of contract and trade secret misappropriation. Photon alleges a viable breach of contract claim based on the non-disclosure agreement incorporated by reference into the employment contract. The face of the complaint does not show that Business and Professions Code 16600 necessarily bars the breach of contract claim. As to the misappropriation claim, Photon describes the subject matter of the trade secret with sufficient particularity as search engine optimization plans, processes, code, and technical information used for American Eagle's US website and not generally known to the public or others who can obtain value from its disclosure. Photon sufficiently pleads misappropriation by alleging Mr. Somasundharam sent proprietary information to his personal email belonging to Photon which he would use to benefit a new employer. Photon also alleges Mr. Somasundharam knowingly and intentionally acquired, used, and/or disclosed Photon's trade secrets regarding SEO for American Eagle. Order signed in open Court. Defendant has thirty days to file an anser.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963. (302/HK)
